Name: Ranjit
Summary: Platform fight with wind-orb placement, bleed bursts, and returning chakram paths.
Description:
[Phase 1] Place Gale Surge wind orbs where they will not block later movement or knock players off the platform.
[Phase 2] Heal or cleanse Fan of Blades bleeds aggressively and use personals if the same players are targeted in back-to-back cycles.
[Phase 3] Track both the outbound and returning path of Wind Chakram while sidestepping Chakram Vortex tornadoes and preserving safe lanes.

Name: Araknath
Summary: Stationary construct fight centered on intercept beams and energy-based burst windows.
Description:
[Phase 1] Keep a tank in melee to stop Blast Wave, but respect the small Defensive Protocol zone under the boss.
[Phase 2] Non-tanks intercept Energize beams from Lesser Constructs, while the tank points Fiery Smash away from beam-soakers and then dodges Heart Exhaustion.
[Phase 3] If any Energize beams connect, prepare group defensives for a much harder Supernova at full energy.

Name: Rukhran
Summary: Stationary bird boss with fixate add control, egg placement, and pillar-hide checks.
Description:
[Phase 1] Swap instantly to the Sunwing from Sunbreak, kite Burning Pursuit cleanly, and never kill the add on top of eggs or it will respawn.
[Phase 2] Tanks stay in range to stop Screech, but the whole group must hide behind the pillar for every Searing Quills cast.
[Phase 3] Return to the boss quickly after each hide and use tank defensives on every Burning Claws.

Name: High Sage Viryx
Summary: Final platform boss with rescue checks, chase-beam placement, and mandatory interrupts.
Description:
[Phase 1] Heal Scorching Ray targets aggressively and use personals if repeat beams stack on the same players.
[Phase 2] When Cast Down grabs a player, they run toward the entrance while the group swaps, stuns, and slows the add before the victim is thrown away.
[Phase 3] Kite Lens Flare to the platform edges, avoid its fire trail, and keep Solar Blast interrupted to reduce tank damage.
